text:
Here's a version of this for Claude Code.

Rebuilt the evidence stack for Claude's memory architecture: Session Memory, MEMORY. md, CLAUDE. md, git history, .claude/skills/, and hooks.

Removed the Chronicle reference (no Claude Code equivalent yet).

Full prompt in the image. https://t.co/3Nqh1tvHvt https://t.co/M3v7fcFtX2
name: God of Prompt

text:
Best AI tooling decision I made this quarter:

Codex and Claude Code on the same repo.

Three wires made it work:

1. Instructions: @AGENTS.md in CLAUDE.md. One source of truth.

2. Skills: ask Claude Code to mirror .claude/skills into .agents/skills with a sync hook. Edit once, https://t.co/KXdWOI34Rz
name: Paweł Huryn

text:
One command:

  npx versuz install pdf-extract

→ resolves from https://t.co/4Xrlgl8JKo
→ downloads SKILL.md + bundle
→ verifies license (MIT)
→ writes to .claude/skills/pdf-extract/

Available in Claude Code immediately. No restart.

https://t.co/4Xrlgl8JKo https://t.co/DZ4jB5rcbz
name: Versuz
